summary: Landing page 'Try Our Courses' feature testing completed. All 4 courses (Beginner Course, Vocabulary & Grammar, Mastery Course, Advanced Mastery) are correctly displayed in the modal and navigate to their respective course pages with proper URL parameters. AI Writing feedback works in Mastery Course. Language switching (TR) correctly translates UI while keeping course content in English.
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 course routes (beginner-course, vocab-grammar, mastery-course, advanced-mastery) are now accessible without authentication - working as expected
URL parameters (lesson={id}&preview=true) are correctly passed and handled by course components
COURSES array in LandingPage.js correctly maps to real course names and routes
AI Writing feedback in Mastery Course returns proper band scores and detailed feedback
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page course preview feature fully tested. All 4 courses accessible without login. URL parameter support working for auto-navigation to specific lessons. AI feedback working in Writing sections. Language switching (EN/VI/TR) correctly translates UI while keeping IELTS course content in English.

landing_page_try_lessons_button.details: Button with data-testid='try-lessons-btn' opens course selector modal

course_selector_modal.details: Shows all 4 courses: Beginner Course (Band 2.0-4.5), Vocabulary & Grammar (Band 4.5-7.0+), Mastery Course (Band 5.5-6.5), Advanced Mastery (Band 6.5-9.0)

beginner_course_navigation.details: Clicking 'Lesson 1: Family' navigates correctly with URL params. All sections (Vocabulary, Grammar, Listening, Reading, Speaking, Writing, Quiz) accessible

vocab_grammar_navigation.details: Clicking 'Unit 1: Daily Life & Routines' navigates correctly. Vocabulary items with definitions, examples, IPA, collocations displayed

mastery_course_navigation.details: Clicking 'Education' module navigates correctly. All sections accessible

advanced_mastery_navigation.details: Clicking 'The Digital Frontier' module navigates correctly. Advanced vocabulary displayed

ai_writing_feedback.details: Writing section in Mastery Course accepts essay input and returns AI feedback with Band scores (Task, Coherence, Lexical, Grammar)

language_switching.details: TR language switch translates UI text (buttons, headers, descriptions) while course content (vocabulary words, definitions, examples) remains in English

no_auth_required.details: All 4 course pages accessible without user login. Routes in App.js correctly configured without auth guards
